description: Allowlist for CephasOps tenant-safety CI. Only listed paths are permitted to use manual tenant scope or to omit TenantScopeExecutor in runtime orchestration. Add entries with a clear reason.

manual_scope_allowed.reason: Bootstrap/seeding; runs before tenant context exists. Documented exception.
Design-time EF factory (migrations, bundle); no request context. Documented exception.
Canonical implementation of scope/bypass; must set TenantScope and call Enter/Exit.
Reads CurrentTenantId for SaveChanges validation and error messages only.
Middleware sets TenantScope.CurrentTenantId per request; required entry point.
Login/token flows set scope for user lookup and session; legacy approved pattern.
Loads jobs platform-wide then runs per-job under scope; bypass only for claim query.
Read-only: query constraint by CurrentTenantId in one branch; does not set or restore scope.
Read-only: resolves company from dto.CompanyId ?? CurrentTenantId for create; does not set or restore scope.

executor_not_required.reason: Platform-only: worker registration and heartbeat; no tenant data.
Platform-only: metrics collection; no tenant-scoped writes.
Platform-only: claims jobs for processor; execution uses executor in BackgroundJobProcessorService.
Delegates to INotificationRetentionService which uses TenantScopeExecutor.
Delegates to IEventPlatformRetentionService which uses TenantScopeExecutor.
Delegates to store/sender; tenant scope handled in downstream services.
Delegates to IOutboundIntegrationBus; tenant context in delivery layer.
Parser/cleanup; scope handled in called services or platform-wide.
